etermine if 2111159 is a prime number:

To check if 2111159 is a prime number, we need to see if it has any divisors other than 1 and itself. Checking divisibility by smaller prime numbers up to approximately the square root of 2111159 (about 1453), we find that 2111159 is divisible by 7.
